package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for rows_to_struct_allocation_per_row_without_reuse: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: New struct allocated for each row scan instead of reusing a scratch variable.
type CaseRowsToStructAllocationPerRowWithoutReuseDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRowsToStructAllocationPerRowWithoutReuseModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRowsToStructAllocationPerRowWithoutReuseRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRowsToStructAllocationPerRowWithoutReuseModel
}

type CaseRowsToStructAllocationPerRowWithoutReuseService struct {
    repo *CaseRowsToStructAllocationPerRowWithoutReuseRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRowsToStructAllocationPerRowWithoutReuseAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeRowsToStructAllocationPerRowWithoutReuse(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRowsToStructAllocationPerRowWithoutReuseDTO) error {
    focus := "rows_to_struct_allocation_per"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    rows_struct_allocation_per_row_negative := map[string]int{"rows": 1, "struct": 2, "allocation": 3, "per": 4, "row": 5, "reuse": 6}
    rows_struct_allocation_per_row_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    rows_negative_0 := rows_struct_allocation_per_row_negative["rows"] + len(input)
    _ = rows_negative_0
    struct_negative_1 := rows_struct_allocation_per_row_negative["struct"] + len(input)
    _ = struct_negative_1
    allocation_negative_2 := rows_struct_allocation_per_row_negative["allocation"] + len(input)
    _ = allocation_negative_2
    for per_negative_3Index, item := range items { rows_struct_allocation_per_row_negative[item.ID] = per_negative_3Index }
    for row_negative_4Index, item := range items { rows_struct_allocation_per_row_negative[item.ID] = row_negative_4Index }
    reuse_negative_5 := rows_struct_allocation_per_row_negative["reuse"] + len(input)
    _ = reuse_negative_5
    return nil
}
